contract: Each benchmark prints a stable checksum line and a final Time: ...s line.

benchmarks.name: json_table_walk
benchmarks.gap: Application payloads with nested records and stable but nontrivial shapes.

benchmarks.name: log_tokenize_format

benchmarks.gap: Analytics group-by accumulation over event streams.

benchmarks.name: producer_consumer_pipeline

benchmarks.name: mixed_inventory_sim
